name: openagents-review
description: Perform code review on a file or path
promptTemplate:
Review the following file or path. Check correctness, security, performance, and style. Before the verdict, name the main assumptions, the strongest missing evidence, and what fact would change the conclusion. If the user's premise conflicts with repo evidence, say so directly. Apply a warranted-fix filter; avoid nit padding. For migrations, check whether old layers were actually replaced or only wrapped.

Target:
